# FMV Evidence

INTROS.AVI:

- codec video=xan_wc4
- codec audio=xan_dpcm
- resolution=320x240
- frame_rate=15 fps

LOGOS.AVI:

- codec video=xan_wc4
- codec audio=xan_dpcm
- resolution=320x240
- frame_rate=15 fps

OUTROS.AVI:

- codec video=xan_wc4
- codec audio=xan_dpcm
- resolution=320x240
- frame_rate=15 fps

Imported symbols in PANDY3.EXE include XanLib.dll, DecompressXD, CreateXanStreamer, DrawFrameXD, and resetFrameTiming.
